generic_rules: Repairs should focus on fixing AGREE syntax errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize resolving identifier references and type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helper variables in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure correct scalar type declarations (int, real, bool) in AGREE contracts.
Use `eq` helpers to define reusable expressions within AGREE contracts.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing unqualified package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the model.
Do not attempt to fix AGREE errors by modifying the AADL architecture.
